name: Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a pan.
2. Add the milk to the melted butter.
3. Beat the eggs and sugar together until foamy.
4. Combine the butter/milk mixture with the beaten eggs and sugar.
5. Add vanilla and yellow food coloring (if desired) to the mixture.
6. Mix the flour and baking powder separately.
7. Add the flour and baking powder mixture to the other ingredients and mix thoroughly.
8. Shape the dough into 6 loaf shapes on two cookie sheets. Each loaf should be about 1 inch high, measuring approximately 4 inches by 8 inches.
9. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
10. Remove from oven and slice into pieces that are about 3/4 inch thick.
11. Bake the slices for a few more minutes at 450°F.
